recent_changes.description: Implemented full Zalo OA Chatbot: webhook endpoint (fire-and-forget), keyword matching (doanh số/điểm), realtime DB query (member, tier, monthly sales, referrals), formatted reply via CS API. Auto-refresh OA token mechanism with 3-layer cache (memory → DB → Zalo API). Admin endpoints for token management.
Fixed Zalo OA dual user ID issue: sender.id (OA-scoped) for reply vs user_id_by_app (App-scoped = zaloId in DB) for member lookup. Was using wrong ID to query DB.
Fixed webhook 400 error: Global ValidationPipe (forbidNonWhitelisted) was rejecting Zalo's verification POST. Changed @Body() dto: ZaloOaWebhookDto → @Body() body: any to bypass validation.

Implemented OA token auto-refresh: tokens stored in system_configs DB table, 3-layer cache, auto-refresh 5min before expiry. Fixed OA endpoint (/v4/oa/access_token not /v4/access_token) and expires_in string parsing.

errors_encountered.solution: Global ValidationPipe forbidNonWhitelisted:true rejects unknown fields. Use @Body() body: any instead of DTO class for webhook endpoints.

errors_encountered.error: OA chatbot sends wrong ID to query DB → member not found
errors_encountered.solution: Zalo sends 2 different IDs: sender.id (OA-scoped, for reply) vs user_id_by_app (App-scoped = zaloId in DB). Use user_id_by_app for DB lookup.

errors_encountered.error: OA token refresh calls wrong endpoint
errors_encountered.solution: OA uses /v4/oa/access_token (not /v4/access_token which is Social API). Also expires_in is STRING '90000' not number.

errors_encountered.error: Zalo OA CS API returns 'OA Tier Package to use this feature'
errors_encountered.solution: OA needs at least 'Dùng thử' package (10K/month) at zalo.cloud/oa/pricing to send messages via API.

decisions_made.decision: Webhook endpoint uses @Body() body: any instead of DTO
decisions_made.reason: Global ValidationPipe rejects unknown fields. Webhook must ALWAYS return 200 OK regardless of payload format.
Dynamic — code can auto-update without restart. Persists across deploys.

decisions_made.decision: 3-layer token cache: memory → DB → API refresh
decisions_made.reason: Minimize DB reads (memory cache). Persist across restarts (DB). Auto-refresh before expiry (API).
Zalo requires fast response. All processing runs async, controller returns 200 immediately.

decisions_made.decision: Use Zalo OA CS API (/v3.0/oa/message/cs) not ZNS
decisions_made.reason: CS API is free (within OA package). ZNS is paid per message (template-based).

decisions_made.decision: ZMA chatbot button uses openChat({type:'oa'}) with pre-filled message
decisions_made.reason: Native Zalo experience — opens OA chat directly in Zalo app.
